notice 1.4.10 — Reflow EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that content can be presented without loss of information or functionality, and without requiring scrolling in two dimensions for: Vertical scrolling content at a width equivalent to 320 CSS pixels; Horizontal scrolling content at a height equivalent to 256 CSS pixels; Except for parts of the content which require two-dimensional layout for usage or meaning.
Affects 50 pages

notice 1.4.11 — Non-text Contrast EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that the visual presentation of the following have a contrast ratio of at least 3:1 against adjacent color(s): User Interface Components: Visual information required to identify user interface components and states, except for inactive components or where the appearance of the component is determined by the user agent and not modified by the author; Graphical Objects: Parts of graphics required to understand the content, except when a particular presentation of graphics is essential to the information being conveyed.
Affects 50 pages

notice 1.4.12 — Text Spacing EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that no loss of content or functionality occurs by setting all of the following and by changing no other style property: Line height (line spacing) to at least 1.5 times the font size; Spacing following paragraphs to at least 2 times the font size; Letter spacing (tracking) to at least 0.12 times the font size; Word spacing to at least 0.16 times the font size.
Affects 50 pages

notice 1.4.13 — Content on Hover or Focus EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that where receiving and then removing pointer hover or keyboard focus triggers additional content to become visible and then hidden, the following are true: Dismissable: A mechanism is available to dismiss the additional content without moving pointer hover or keyboard focus, unless the additional content communicates an input error or does not obscure or replace other content; Hoverable: If pointer hover can trigger the additional content, then the pointer can be moved over the additional content without the additional content disappearing; Persistent: The additional content remains visible until the hover or focus trigger is removed, the user dismisses it, or its information is no longer valid.
Affects 50 pages

notice 2.1.4 — Character Key Shortcuts EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that if a keyboard shortcut is implemented in content using only letter (including upper- and lower-case letters), punctuation, number, or symbol characters, then at least one of the following is true: Turn off: A mechanism is available to turn the shortcut off; Remap: A mechanism is available to remap the shortcut to use one or more non-printable keyboard characters (e.g. Ctrl, Alt, etc); Active only on focus: The keyboard shortcut for a user interface component is only active when that component has focus.
Affects 50 pages

notice 2.2.2 — Pause, Stop, Hide EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
If any part of the content moves, scrolls or blinks for more than 5 seconds, or auto-updates, check that there is a mechanism available to pause, stop, or hide the content.
Affects 50 pages

notice 2.3.1 — Three Flashes or Below Threshold EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that no component of the content flashes more than three times in any 1-second period, or that the size of any flashing area is sufficiently small.
Affects 50 pages

notice 2.4.1 — Bypass Blocks EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Ensure that any common navigation elements can be bypassed; for instance, by use of skip links, header elements, or ARIA landmark roles.
Affects 50 pages

notice 2.5.1 — Pointer Gestures EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that all functionality that uses multipoint or path-based gestures for operation can be operated with a single pointer without a path-based gesture, unless a multipoint or path-based gesture is essential.
Affects 50 pages

notice 2.5.2 — Pointer Cancellation EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that for functionality that can be operated using a single pointer, at least one of the following is true: No Down-Event: The down-event of the pointer is not used to execute any part of the function; Abort or Undo: Completion of the function is on the up-event, and a mechanism is available to abort the function before completion or to undo the function after completion; Up Reversal: The up-event reverses any outcome of the preceding down-event; Essential: Completing the function on the down-event is essential.
Affects 50 pages
  • https://www.kidhora.it/eventi/
  • https://www.kidhora.it/eventi/open-day-la-casa-del-glicine/
  • https://www.kidhora.it/eventi/spring-time/

notice 2.5.3 — Label in Name EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Affects 50 pages

notice 2.5.4 — Motion Actuation EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that functionality that can be operated by device motion or user motion can also be operated by user interface components and responding to the motion can be disabled to prevent accidental actuation, except when: Supported Interface: The motion is used to operate functionality through an accessibility supported interface; Essential: The motion is essential for the function and doing so would invalidate the activity.
Affects 50 pages

notice 3.1.2 — Language of Parts EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA

Affects 50 pages

notice 3.2.3 — Consistent Navigation EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA
Check that navigational mechanisms that are repeated on multiple Web pages occur in the same relative order each time they are repeated, unless a change is initiated by the user.
Affects 50 pages

9 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9eb69ded
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9eb69ded
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > article:nth-child(2) > h2 > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > article:nth-child(3) > h2 > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > article:nth-child(4) > h2 > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > article:nth-child(5) > h2 > a
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > article:nth-child(5) > div > p > img
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > article:nth-child(5) > div > p > img
https://www.kidhora.it/eventi/open-day-la-casa-del-glicine/
5 errors 11 warnings 12 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9eb6d0c2
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9eb6d0c2
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(1) > div > nav > ol > li:nth-child(4)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > img

WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content

Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(4) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > div > div:nth-child(1)
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(5) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.

 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.37:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #e32d0d.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(5) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > a
warning 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Img element is marked so that it is ignored by Assistive Technology.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > img:nth-child(1)
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > img:nth-child(6)
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.37:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #e32d0d.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(6) > div:nth-child(3) > div > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(6) > div:nth-child(3) > div > a
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(2)

warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		Check that this element has an inherited background colour or image to complement the corresponding inline foreground colour.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > div > button:nth-child(1)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > div > button:nth-child(1)

notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.

 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(4) > div > div > a
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

Non-text Content

Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

5 errors 21 warnings 21 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title

Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.

warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(5) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > a
warning 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Img element is marked so that it is ignored by Assistive Technology.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > img:nth-child(1)
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > img:nth-child(1)

Non-text Content

Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > img:nth-child(6)
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.37:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #e32d0d.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(6) > div:nth-child(3) > div > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(6) > div:nth-child(3) > div > a
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(2)

warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		Check that this element has an inherited background colour or image to complement the corresponding inline foreground colour.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > div > button:nth-child(1)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > div > button:nth-child(1)

Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

13 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

5 errors 24 warnings 36 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9f045adf
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9f045adf
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(1) > div > nav > ol > li:nth-child(4)
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > span
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content

Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > h3:nth-child(8) > img
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > h3:nth-child(8) > img
warning 1.3.1 — Info and Relationships
WCAG 1.3.1 		Heading markup should be used if this content is intended as a heading.
Info and Relationships
Information and relationships conveyed through presentation must also be available in code (e.g., headings, lists, tables use proper HTML elements).
Impact: Assistive technology users may miss the structure and meaning of content.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > p:nth-child(14)

 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(3) > div > p:nth-child(71)
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(5) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(5) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > a
warning 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Img element is marked so that it is ignored by Assistive Technology.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > img:nth-child(1)

Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #event-map > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > img:nth-child(8)
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.37:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #e32d0d.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(6) > div:nth-child(3) > div > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(6) > div:nth-child(3) > div > a
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > h3

Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > p
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		Check that this element has an inherited background colour or image to complement the corresponding inline foreground colour.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > button:nth-child(1)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > button:nth-child(1)

Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

https://www.kidhora.it/ristoranti/fattoria-sociale-fuori-di-zucca/
2 errors 10 warnings 12 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9f29124c
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9f29124c
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > header > nav > div > div:nth-child(1) > a > noscript
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 4.45:1. Recommendation: change background to #fafbfc.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(1) > div > nav > ol > li:nth-child(4)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)

On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.

Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(2)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(2)
warning 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Img element is marked so that it is ignored by Assistive Technology.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > img
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > img
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > a
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.37:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #e32d0d.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(4) > div > a

Link Purpose (In Context)

Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.

2 errors 10 warnings 12 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > a
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.37:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #e32d0d.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(4) > div > a

Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(4) > div > a

WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(3) > a
https://www.kidhora.it/ristoranti/tardis-pub/
2 errors 5 warnings 10 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9f740784
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9f740784
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > header > nav > div > div:nth-child(1) > a > noscript
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 4.45:1. Recommendation: change background to #fafbfc.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(1) > div > nav > ol > li:nth-child(4)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(2)

Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.

All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > img
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > img
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > a
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > a
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		Check that this element has an inherited background colour or image to complement the corresponding inline foreground colour.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(5) > div > span

WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.37:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #e32d0d.

Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

https://www.kidhora.it/ristoranti/benvenuto-family-restaurant-milano/
17 errors 9 warnings 17 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.

warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.

 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(1) > div > span:nth-child(5)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(2)

warning 1.3.1 — Info and Relationships
WCAG 1.3.1 		The heading structure is not logically nested. This h6 element should be an h3 to be properly nested.
Info and Relationships
Information and relationships conveyed through presentation must also be available in code (e.g., headings, lists, tables use proper HTML elements).
Impact: Assistive technology users may miss the structure and meaning of content.

Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #reviews > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > span:nth-child(2)
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 1.63:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #967100.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #reviews > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > span:nth-child(3)
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 1.63:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #967100.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #reviews > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > span:nth-child(4)
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 1.63:1. Recommendation: change text colour to #967100.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #reviews > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > span:nth-child(5)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #reviews > div:nth-child(1) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(3) > button
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #reviews > div:nth-child(2) > button
warning 1.3.1 — Info and Relationships
WCAG 1.3.1 		If this element contains a navigation section, it is recommended that it be marked up as a list.
Info and Relationships
Information and relationships conveyed through presentation must also be available in code (e.g., headings, lists, tables use proper HTML elements).
Impact: Assistive technology users may miss the structure and meaning of content.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(3) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(3) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > a:nth-child(3)
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(3) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > a:nth-child(3)
notice 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)
WCAG 2.4.4 		Check that the link text combined with programmatically determined link context identifies the purpose of the link.
Link Purpose (In Context)
The purpose of each link must be clear from the link text alone, or from the link text together with its context.
Impact: Screen reader users navigating a list of links cannot determine where "click here" goes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(3) > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > a:nth-child(4)
https://www.kidhora.it/ristoranti/la-giuggiola-agriturismo/
2 errors 4 warnings 9 notices ▼
Severity WCAG Criterion What's Wrong Legal Impact Element
notice 2.4.2 — Page Titled
WCAG 2.4.2 		Check that the title element describes the document.
Page Titled
Web pages must have descriptive, meaningful titles.
Impact: Users navigating with browser tabs or screen readers cannot identify pages without titles.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > head > title
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		Ensure that the img element's alt text serves the same purpose and presents the same information as the image.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9fc1b33e
notice 1.1.1 — Non-text Content
WCAG 1.1.1 		If this image cannot be fully described in a short text alternative, ensure a long text alternative is also available, such as in the body text or through a link.
Non-text Content
All images, icons, and non-text content must have text alternatives that describe their purpose.
Impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what images convey without alt text.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA #header-logo-69bbe9fc1b33e
warning 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > header > nav > div > div:nth-child(1) > a > noscript
error 1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum)
WCAG 1.4.3 		This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 4.45:1. Recommendation: change background to #fafbfc.
Contrast (Minimum)
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background (3:1 for large text).
Impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read text with insufficient contrast.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(1) > div > nav > ol > li:nth-child(4)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
notice 3.2.1 — On Focus
WCAG 3.2.1 		Check that a change of context does not occur when this input field receives focus.
On Focus
Receiving keyboard focus must not trigger an unexpected change of context.
Impact: Keyboard and screen reader users are disoriented when focusing an element causes page changes.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(1)
warning 2.5.3 — Label in Name
WCAG 2.5.3 		Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
Label in Name
For UI components with visible text labels, the accessible name must contain the visible text.
Impact: Voice control users who speak the visible label cannot activate controls with mismatched accessible names.
 EAA WAD Section 508 ADA Equality Act PSBAR BITV 2.0 RGAA DDA ACA html > body > main > section:nth-child(2) > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(2)
